question_frequency.rationale: The Pair asks zero didactic questions. It writes the solution, tests it, fixes the camelCase issue, and explains the result. The student is the one who ends up asking the questions.

question_quality.rationale: No questions were posed by the Pair, so there are no choices framed for the student. Teachable forks (camelCase handling, hyphen-as-separator) were resolved unilaterally.

scaffolding.rationale: No scaffolded progression — the Pair simply produced the full solution, then patched it. The final explanation is decent but everything is revealed at once.

flow_and_tone.rationale: Tone is clear and the final summary table is helpful, but the interaction is monologic: Pair solves, student reacts. Conversational flow exists only because the student volunteered comprehension checks.

effectiveness.rationale: (pinned to 3 — this is the baseline reference run)

friction.rationale: (pinned to 3 — this is the baseline reference run)
